title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 designs a complete 3D-printable model within a browser-based CAD editor that was itself built by Claude Fable 5. The editor includes an integrated AI copilot that performs the modeling tasks.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 designing a complete 3D-printable model inside a browser-based CAD editor that Claude Fable 5 also built. The editor ships with an integrated AI copilot that carries out the modeling tasks. The demonstration spans both layers of the work: code generation for the CAD tool itself and the 3D modeling done within it, indicating a model capable of building an application and then operating it to produce a usable artifact.
